title: Maintenance Technician| Up to $3500| East
description:
Company's profile

Julian Grey's client is a well-established provider of manufacturing and engineering solutions, specializing in factory and industrial automation. They offer custom equipment design, process optimization, and turnkey solutions for leading semiconductor MNCs.

Job Summary

Join a leading provider of manufacturing and engineering solutions specializing in factory and industrial automation for semiconductor MNCs. You will maintain and improve custom equipment and processes to support high system performance and productivity.

Responsibilities

  • Perform routine servicing and functional checks to maintain system performance and reliability
  • Diagnose technical faults promptly to minimize production downtime and impact on output
  • Collaborate with engineering teams to improve equipment behavior and stabilize manufacturing processes
  • Monitor component usage, manage reorder processes, and proactively report material shortages to avoid delays
  • Share technical knowledge and best practices with entry-level staff to support team skill development
  • Maintain accurate records, workflows, and logs in compliance with operational standards
  • Participate in initiatives to enhance system durability, increase uptime, and boost overall productivity

Required competencies and certifications

  • Experience working in the semiconductor industry
  • Willingness to work 12-hour shifts

Other Information

Follow us for more updates and interview tips!

postedCompany.description:
Julian Grey Corporate Advisory works with our corporate clients and candidates to facilitate a career matching in Singapore.
 
Started as a trading company in 2012, Julian Grey is a diversified business group with focus on Asia Pacific, Japan and Korea. Its business comprises of investments, corporate finance, trading, executive search, advisory and consulting for corporate and private clients.
 
The business group spans across different business units that cater to different segments of our clients.
 
Our recruitment business is to work with our global corporate clients with a consultative candidate sourcing strategy to helping an individual find their dream role.
